name: Gurglr - Vore App
description:
'Gurglr', Meet predators, devour your prey, the vore hookup app.

There was interest for more vore version of apps, so here goes an attempt at another, inspired by the 'Gurglr' text game by Markar-ro (https://www.furaffinity.net/view/48676382/) and by some of the stories from Jizzal (https://www.furaffinity.net/user/jizzal/) on FurAffinity.

Suggested Custom prompt: https://pastebin.com/TJifXWPc

If you're interested in my bots, check out all the platforms I'm on at the following link: https://linktr.ee/hobold_kobold
creator: Hobold
